title: Add jjf assign <id> <name> shorthand verb
body:
# Goal

Add `jjf assign <id> <name>` as a short verb. Today this is
`jjf update <id> --assignee <name>` â€” works fine, but is
verbose at the keyboard and verbose in scripts. Beads
ships `bd assign <id> <name>` as exactly this sugar (see
`reference/beads/cmd/bd/assign.go`).

# Spec

```
jjf assign <id> <name>           # set assignee
jjf assign <id> ""               # unset (mirrors bd's pattern)
jjf assign --json <id> <name>    # JSON envelope
```

Semantically identical to `jjf update <id> --assignee <name>`
and `jjf update <id> --unset-assignee` respectively. Same
preflight (issues_bookmark probe, handle resolution), same
typed errors (`issue_not_found` / `slug_not_found` /
`invalid_input` on newline-bearing name).

# Why now

Low-cost agent-ergonomics polish. The asterinas migration
fan-out (`cc2fa96`) and any orchestrator that batches
issue-assignment ops benefits from one fewer flag per
call. Cheap.

# Out of scope

- Implicit "current user" assign â€” `jjf assign <id>` with
  no name argument. That's what `--claim` already does
  (and it also flips status to `in-progress`). The
  shorthand keeps the assign-only semantic clean and
  separate.
- Multi-assignee. `assignee` is a single string today;
  this isn't the ticket to change that.
- Bulk assign (`jjf assign --label <l> <name>`). Maybe
  later; out of scope here.

# Implementation sketch

`Commands::Assign { id: String, name: String }` at
`crates/jjf/src/main.rs`. `run_assign` dispatches to
the existing `Storage::set_assignee` (the same path
`run_update` uses with `--assignee`). Empty `name`
calls `set_assignee(id, None)`. Probably ~40 lines
including doc comment, mirroring the existing
`run_close` / `run_open` thin-wrapper pattern.

Plain-text output: `assigned <id> to <name>` /
`unassigned <id>`. JSON envelope:
`{"ok":true,"id":"...","assignee":"alice"}` or
`{"ok":true,"id":"...","assignee":null}`.

# Acceptance

- [ ] `jjf assign <id> alice` writes assignee = alice.
- [ ] `jjf assign <id> ""` clears the assignee.
- [ ] `--json` envelope as above.
- [ ] CLI integration test mirroring the existing
      `crates/jjf/tests/` patterns.
- [ ] `docs/cli-json.md` per-verb section.

# Depends on

Independent of the actor-override ticket (`ae0866b`).
Either can ship first; both can ship together.

# Cross-refs

- Beads' impl: `reference/beads/cmd/bd/assign.go`.
- jjforge's existing `Storage::set_assignee`:
  `crates/jjf-storage/src/lib.rs` (grep `pub fn set_assignee`).
